节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Outputs debug-level logs. if the value exceeds the range, logs cannot be printed.
注释信息: @param { number } domain Indicates the service domain, which is a hexadecimal integer ranging from 0x0 to 0xFFFF
@param { string } tag Identifies the log tag, length cannot exceed 32 bytes, the excess part will be truncated.
@param { string } format Indicates the log format string.
